    Index

    A C D E F G H I K L M N O P Q R S U V 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    O

    onAddAccountClick() - Method in class com.example.passmanager.MainScreenController
    When the Add Account button is clicked we create a pop-up asking for the necessary information, as long as the information passes the validation format from AddAccountController the account gets created and the listview is updated by calling all the accounts from the database again.
    onAddClick() - Method in class com.example.passmanager.AddAccountController
    Handles - Text Field Inputs and validation, Password Requirements check, Creates a connection to database to call a query to add the account information in.
    onBackClick(ActionEvent) - Method in class com.example.passmanager.ModelController
    Navigates back to the welcome screen.
    onCancelClick() - Method in class com.example.passmanager.AddAccountController
    When the pop-up screen to add an account appears there is a cancel button that closes this pop-up.
    onCreateAccountClick(ActionEvent) - Method in class com.example.passmanager.ModelController
    Navigates to the create-account form view.
    onCreateAccountSubmit(ActionEvent) - Method in class com.example.passmanager.ModelController
    Handles submission of the create-account form.
    onLoginClick(ActionEvent) - Method in class com.example.passmanager.ModelController
    Navigates to the login view.
    onLoginSubmit(ActionEvent) - Method in class com.example.passmanager.ModelController
    Handles login form submission.
